title: Additional Realism
description: ... a unique Minecraft resource-pack that emulates shader-pack features. Marvelous custom skies. Lightmap and shadows. This and much more awaits you! Get yours and toggle on the realism!
body:
# Additional Realism **Additional Realism is a unique Minecraft resource-pack that emulates shader-pack features.** - Marvelous custom skies. - Expressive lightmap & shadows. - HD animated water. This and much more awaits You. You can also combine this pack with other creations You like. Or just stick to Minecraft default. To get the most of this pack, please use the OptiFine mod ([OptiFine Download](https://optifine.net/downloads)) and configure bringtness to the minimum. **'Toggle on the realism!'**

**This is a Premium resource-pack** - You can get a Lite – downscaled edition – **for free** - You can get a DEMO – special edition that allows You to check out the full features – **for free** - The FULL resource-pack is paid There are 2 options to get the Full resource-pack ▼ 1. **Go to the [product page](https://www.digitalambition.tech/additional-realism) on our site & make a one time purchase** – OR – 2. **Consider becoming our patron at [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/digitalambition)** **Lite – free download** ![Preview of the LITE version](https://i.imgur.com/9AXmPOH.png) **Full – paid** ![Preview of the FULL version](https://i.imgur.com/6M9TqIa.png) **See the Additional Realism trailer ▼**
